title: eulophia ovalis
intro: Eulophia ovalis, also known as the Guinea yellow orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Eulophia ovalis is prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, with the leaves and roots being used separately or in combination to create these herbal preparations.
